zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Kennedy於1472年3月8日出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾馬波爾時，她的父親John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy35歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Gordon29歲。她於1499年2月4日與Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾登努結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1542年5月28日在蘇格蘭藍納可爾阿沃代爾享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Kennedy于1472年3月8日出生在苏格兰艾斯爾馬波爾时，她的父亲John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy35岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Gordon29岁。她于1499年2月4日与Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale在英国苏格兰艾斯爾登努结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1542年5月28日在苏格兰藍納可爾阿沃代爾享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kennedy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceannéidigh ‘descendant of Ceannéidigh’ (from ceann ‘head’ + éidigh ‘ugly’); or from the Scottish Gaelic Mac Cinnèidigh, consisting of mac ‘son’ with an equivalent name. Compare Canaday , Cannady , Cannedy , Kannady , and Kenedy .

History: Kennedy ancestral lands are found both in Ireland and in Scotland, where the family's medieval ancestral seat is sited on the Ayrshire coast, facing the Irish Sea. — The great-grandparents of President John Fitzgerald Kennedy (1917–63) came to North America as immigrants from Ireland in the 1840s. His paternal great-grandparents were Patrick Kennedy (1823–58), born in Dunganstown, County Wexford, Ireland, and Bridget Murphy, who was born probably in Owenduff, County Wexford, Ireland c. 1827; they came to Boston, MA, in 1849. His maternal great-grandparents were Thomas Fitzgerald (1823–85), who was born in Bruff, County Limerick, Ireland, and Rose Anna Cox, who was born probably in Tomregan or Kinawley, County Cavan, Ireland, c. 1835; they came to Boston, MA, in 1857. — An early Scottish Kennedy forebear of a quite different family was British colonial official Archibald Kennedy (1685–1763), the son of Alexander Kennedy of Craigoch, who emigrated to NY c. 1710.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Kennedy was born on 8 March 1472, in Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy, was 35 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Gordon, was 29. She married Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale on 4 February 1499, in Dunure, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 28 May 1542, in Avondale, Lanarkshire, Scotland, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Kennedy est née le 8 mars 1472, à Maybole, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Gordon, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale le 4 février 1499, à Dunure, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 mai 1542, à Avondale, Lanarkshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Kennedy am 8. März 1472 in Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy 35 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Gordon 29. Sie hat am 4. Februar 1499 in Dunure, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. Mai 1542 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Avondale, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Kennedy è nata il il 8 marzo 1472 nel Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Gordon, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale il 4 febbraio 1499, nel Dunure, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 28 maggio 1542, nel Avondale, Lanarkshire, Scotland, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Kennedyが1472年3月8日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアメイボルで生まれた時，父John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedyは35歳，母Lady Elizabeth Gordonは29歳であった。1499年2月4日にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアダヌアでAndrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1542年5月28日にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアアボンダルで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Kennedy(이)가 1472년 3월 8일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 메이볼일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Gordon(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1499년 2월 4일 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 던르에서 Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1542년 5월 28일 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 아폰데일에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.8 March 1472–28 May 1542: 8 de março de 1472–28 de maio de 1542
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Kennedy nasceu em 8 de março de 1472, em Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Gordon, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale em 4 de fevereiro de 1499, em Dunure, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de maio de 1542, em Avondale, Lanarkshire, Scotland, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Kennedy родилась 8 марта 1472 г. в местности меибол, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Gordon, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale 4 февраля 1499 г. в местности дунур, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 28 мая 1542 г. в местности авондеил, ланаркшир, Шотландия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.8 March 1472–28 May 1542: 8 de marzo de 1472–28 de mayo de 1542
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret Kennedy nació el 8 de marzo de 1472, en Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Gordon, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale el 4 de febrero de 1499, en Dunure, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 28 de mayo de 1542, en Avondale, Lanarkshire, Scotland, a la edad de 70 años.
